user_menu.connect_title: Create an account or pair your CLI
user_menu.signup_subtitle: No CLI needed — play right away
user_menu.login_subtitle: I already have a recovery key
user_menu.unpair_confirm_body: Have you saved your recovery key (anon_id + arena_secret)? Without it, you can't recover this account.

home.subtitle_part1: Collect, evolve, and battle other trainers. All from your Claude Code statusline — installed via
home.tile_pokedex_desc: Browse the 151 canonical entries. Every sprite tells your progress — caught, seen, or still unknown.
home.tile_arena_desc: Fight other trainers in async battles. Server-side turn resolution, shareable replays.
home.tile_trail_desc: Follow a scripted path through the biomes. Short quests, rare events, time-gated rewards.
home.tile_zones_desc: Explore from Route 1 to Mt. Silver. Each zone has its own Pokémon pool, lore and level requirement.
home.footer_roadmap_pre: ⚔️ Async battles, trades, and the full arena are coming in
home.footer_privacy: Privacy first · Anonymous IDs · No tracking · Open source

signup.title: Create my trainer
signup.subtitle: No Claude Code needed. Pick a starter, fight arena bots, and level up your Pokémon in the wild zones (coming soon).
signup.displayname_hint: 2-24 chars, alphanumeric + _ -. You can change it later from your profile.
signup.privacy_notice: 🔒 Your account is anonymous by default — we generate a random anon_id browser-side, no email required. The auth key (arena_secret) is stored in localStorage. You'll later be able to link your claude-pokemon CLI install to this account.
signup.have_account_login: I already have a web account — sign me back in with my key
signup.have_account_pair: I already have a CLI account — I want to pair
signup.error_displayname: Invalid display name (2-24 chars, alphanumeric + _ -). Leave empty to stay anonymous.
signup.error_collision: This anon_id already exists (collision is extremely rare). Try again — a fresh one will be drawn.
signup.recovery_intro: These two values are the only way to recover your account if you clear the browser. No email, no password reset — we don't store the key in cleartext server-side. Save them now.
signup.recovery_acknowledge: I have saved my key (password manager, secure file, etc.) and I understand it won't be shown again.

login.title: Sign back in
login.subtitle: Paste your recovery key to recover your account. You got it at signup; we can't email it to you (nothing is stored in cleartext server-side).
login.combined_autofill_hint: The two fields below will auto-fill when you paste here.
login.error_format: Invalid format. anon_id = 8-16 hex chars; arena_secret = 32-64 hex chars.
login.error_not_found: Account not found. Check your anon_id.
login.error_invalid_secret: Invalid recovery key. Check your arena_secret.
login.error_file_unreadable: Unreadable file — expected: JSON with anon_id and arena_secret fields.
login.lost_key_body: The account is permanently inaccessible — that's the price of anonymity (no email = no reset). You can create a new account; the old one stays in the database but orphaned.

pokedex.title: 📖 Pokédex
pokedex.own_pokedex: ✨ Your pokédex — {seen} / {total} encountered (un-encountered appear greyed out)
pokedex.trainer_load_error: ⚠ Load error ({message}). Try again in a moment.
pokedex.show_only_trainer: Show only species this trainer has seen

leaderboard.empty: No trainer has shared their stats yet. Be the first:

profile.title: My profile
profile.bio_placeholder: Trainer from Pallet Town. Fire specialist since 2026.
profile.badges_empty: You haven't unlocked any badges yet. Play to earn them!
profile.pair_cli_intro: Also using claude-pokemon locally? Generate a 6-char code, then run the link command on your CLI to import this account. Your local state.json will be rewritten from the web account.
profile.danger_zone_intro: Disconnecting this browser removes your arena_secret from localStorage. You can re-pair anytime via the pair command on your CLI.

pair.title: 🔗 CLI ↔ web pairing
pair.subtitle: Link your CLI install to this browser to commit live PvP moves from the battle page.
pair.step1: Step 1: on your CLI install, run the pair command. You'll get a 6-char code.
pair.step2: Step 2: enter the code below (or click the link generated by the CLI).
pair.invalid_response: Invalid Worker response (malformed anon_id or secret).
pair.secret_notice: 🔒 Your arena_secret is only stored in this browser's localStorage. To remove it, click "Disconnect" here, or clear the site data.

arena.title: ⚔️ Arena
arena.subtitle: Async PvP. Trainers opt in from their CLI then challenge each other. Battles resolve deterministically and are replayable here.
arena.no_trainers_intro: Be the first to enable the arena from your CLI:
arena.footer_cta: Want to fight? Install the CLI and run the challenge command.

zones.title: 🗺️ Wild zones
zones.subtitle: 8 themed zones, each with its own wild Pokémon ecosystem. Battle to earn XP and level up.
zones.must_pair: Sign in to explore a zone.
zones.legend_sweet: Optimal XP for your current level.
zones.legend_outclassed: Too easy — earned XP is reduced.
zones.legend_locked: Level too low. Come back after grinding elsewhere.
zones.legend_preview: Create an account or pair your CLI to explore.
zones.exploring_grass: You search through the tall grass…
zones.defeat_hint: No XP this time. The wild Pokémon escapes.
zones.no_pokemon: No known Pokémon in this zone.
zones.intro_pair: To explore this zone, you need a trainer account.
zones.locked_body: This zone requires at least level {min}. You are level {current}. Explore easier zones to level up.
zones.idle_hint: Dive into the tall grass to meet a wild Pokémon.
zones.item_decorative_note: (inventory system coming soon — the item is purely decorative for now)
zones.meta_description: Explore the wild zones of claude-pokemon — catch, fight, earn XP.
zones.err_account_missing: Your account doesn't exist on this server. Locally, create one via /signup first (prod accounts don't exist in the local KV).
zones.err_zone_locked: This zone is locked — your level is too low.
zones.err_invalid_secret: Your arena_secret was rejected. Re-pair your CLI or create a new account.

ladder.title: 🏞️ Trail
ladder.subtitle: Fight 8 scripted bots. Each win unlocks the next.
ladder.intro_pre: Battle through 15 NPC trainers, each tougher than the last. Beat the Champion to earn the
ladder.intro_post: title — displayed on your public trainer card and the leaderboard. Progress is saved locally (offline-friendly).
ladder.reset_confirm: Reset all Trail progress? This cannot be undone.
ladder.footer_offline: Solo ladder battles run entirely client-side — no Worker roundtrip, no internet required once the page is loaded.
ladder.page_desc: Battle through 15 NPC trainers to earn the Trail Conqueror title. Solo gameplay loop, offline-friendly.
ladder.champion_warning: ⚠ Champion fight — beat to earn Trail Conqueror

trainer.not_found_optout: They might have opted out via

pokedex_detail.not_found_body: No species with id {id} in Gen 1 + Gen 2.
pokedex_detail.no_zones: Not yet found in any wild zone.

battle.title: Battle
battle.not_found_expired: Battles are kept for 30 days. This one may have expired.
battle.footer_deterministic: Battles are deterministic — given the same seed + snapshots, the engine will always produce this exact log.
battle.page_desc: Replay an arena battle in claude-pokemon — turn-by-turn animation, type effectiveness, winner.

live_battle.title: Live battle
live_battle.commit_in_progress_done: ✓ Move locked — waiting for the opponent.
live_battle.play_from_cli_pre: You can also play from the CLI:
live_battle.page_desc: Spectate a live PvP battle in claude-pokemon — turn-by-turn polling.
